site.welcomeText: Your digital guest guide — everything you need during your stay in the beautiful Lefkada!
site.heroAlt: Illustrated hero view for Vardania Comfort Stay

wifi.title: WiFi Information
wifi.notes: The router is in the living room next to the TV. There is also an NFC option to connect. Restart if needed.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.map: Use the address in your booking confirmation for navigation.
accommodation.arrival: Check-in after 15:00. Please contact the host in advance to arrange your arrival.
accommodation.late_checkout: Late check-out may be available upon request and subject to availability. Contact host in advance to arrange.
accommodation.transfer: Free transfer is available from the KTEL bus station to the apartment, or transfer from the airport is available for a €20 fee.
accommodation.air_condition: The AC remote is in the living room, next to the TV remote. Recommended setting: 24–26°C for comfort and energy savings.
accommodation.water: Tap water is not drinkable. Please use bottled water for drinking.
accommodation.hot_water: Hot water is available 24h assisted by solar heating. In winter, on cloudy days, heating may be reduced.
accommodation.beach_faucet: There is a faucet outside the apartment to rinse your feet after the beach.
accommodation.breakfast: Some basic breakfast items (coffee, tea, bread, jams) are available in the kitchen.
accommodation.bbq: If you need a BBQ setup, contact the host in advance so it can be provided and prepared.
accommodation.consumables: Please do not remove consumables except slippers, essentials, breakfasts, chocolates.
accommodation.baby_chair: A baby chair is available if you request it in advance.
accommodation.board_games: There are board games under the TV. Please tidy them up after use and make sure no pieces are lost.

house_rules.title: 📋 House Rules
rules: Place any board games back in their boxes with all the pieces.
Shake sand off before entering from the beach.

transport.title: Transportation
transport.info: Nearest bus stop is 8 minutes walk. Taxis and ride-hailing apps work reliably in the area.

restaurants.title: Restaurants & Cafes
restaurants.intro: Selected local restaurants and cafes nearby.

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.text: Supermarket is within 5 minutes by foot.

pharmacy.title: Pharmacy
pharmacy.text: The nearest Pharmacy is within 8 minutes by foot.

atm.title: ATM
atm.text: ATMs are available in Lefkada Town.

cafes.title: Cafes
cafes.text: Coffee spots are everywhere in the town center.

bakery.title: Bakery
bakery.text: Local bakeries offer fresh bread and pastries in the mornings.

gas.title: Gas Station
gas.text: Fuel stations are located on main roads around Lefkada.
